case_title: ORLANDO FERNANDO CRUZ VS. MARIA RONDOLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUZ, ORLANDO FERNANDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ORLANDO FERNANDO CRUZ, WITH WITNESS CONCEPCION CABELLARRA, AND DEFENDANTS MARIA RONDOLO, A/K/A MARIA C. RONDOLO, AND RONALDO RONDOLO, WITH WITNESS, GLORIA MADRID. MARIEL FALAK, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER, ASSISTED MR. CRUZ & MS. MADRID AT TODAY'S HEARING. PROOF OF SERVICE IN FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, ORLANDO FERNANDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RONDOLO, MARIA AKA MARIA C. RONDOLO RONDOLO, RONALDO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DUPLICATE FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE RE MARIA RONDOLO FROM THE SHERIFFS DEPT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.
